metadata.title: Ideogram V3 Reframe Image - AI Image Editor | Marble AI
metadata.description: Ideogram V3 Reframe by Ideogram AI. Specialized image-to-image model for intelligently extending and adapting images across diverse aspect ratios with advanced AI outpainting.

hero.title: Ideogram V3 Reframe Image
hero.description: Ideogram's specialized image reframing model. Intelligently extend and adapt images across diverse aspect ratios with advanced AI outpainting technology.

introduce.title: About Ideogram V3 Reframe
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Ideogram V3 Reframe is a specialized image-to-image model built on Ideogram 3.0, designed to intelligently extend and adapt images across diverse aspect ratios and resolutions.

items.title: AI Outpainting
items.description: Advanced AI outpainting technology that seamlessly extends image content beyond original boundaries.

items.title: Aspect Ratio Adaptation
items.description: Intelligently adapt images to any aspect ratio while preserving visual consistency.

items.title: Visual Consistency
items.description: Maintains visual consistency across extended areas with natural blending.

items.title: Creative Reframing
items.description: Enable creative reframing for digital, print, and video content.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Ideogram V3 Reframe ideal for image adaptation.

items.title: Image-to-Image Only
items.description: Specialized for image editing and transformation workflows.

items.title: Smart Extension
items.description: Intelligently extends image content with context-aware generation.

items.title: Multiple Formats
items.description: Support for various output formats and resolutions.

items.title: Fast Processing
items.description: Quick reframing without compromising quality.

items.title: API Integration
items.description: Seamless API access for developers to integrate into applications.

items.title: Commercial License
items.description: Full commercial rights for all reframed images.

use-cases.title: Use Cases
use-cases.description: Explore the diverse applications of Ideogram V3 Reframe.

items.title: Social Media Adaptation
items.description: Adapt images for different social media platform aspect ratios.

items.title: Print Media
items.description: Extend images for print formats and various paper sizes.

items.title: Video Thumbnails
items.description: Create video thumbnails and banners from existing images.

items.title: Marketing Materials

items.title: Digital Art
items.description: Extend digital artwork for different display requirements.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about Ideogram V3 Reframe.

items.title: What is Ideogram V3 Reframe?
items.description: Ideogram V3 Reframe is a specialized image-to-image model for intelligently extending and adapting images across diverse aspect ratios.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Ideogram V3 Reframe supports Image To Image editing only, specializing in reframing and outpainting.

items.title: What is AI outpainting?
items.description: AI outpainting is the technology of extending image content beyond its original boundaries while maintaining visual consistency.

items.title: Can it change aspect ratios?
items.description: Yes! Ideogram V3 Reframe excels at adapting images to different aspect ratios while preserving visual coherence.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All images reframed with Ideogram V3 Reframe through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: What formats does it support?
items.description: It supports various output formats and resolutions suitable for digital, print, and video content.

cta.title: Ready to Try Ideogram V3 Reframe?
cta.description: Experience intelligent image reframing. Adapt your images to any aspect ratio.
